$description: LOOLOO product brand theme — DESIGN SIGNED OFF 2026-07-08 (primary #60CFCB = brand secondary.300 ramp; accent #0B2846 navy, no ramp step — stored as literal OKLCH). Foreground overrides are REQUIRED: the teal primary needs dark text (10.64:1 vs 1.86:1 with white). Not yet consumed at runtime — compiled to dist/themes/looloo.css; a product opts in via [data-theme="looloo"] once theme switching ships.

primary-foreground.$description: Dark text on the teal primary — 10.64:1 (white would be 1.86:1).

accent.$description: Signed off: #0B2846 (deep navy; no matching ramp step — literal).
